title: Header Cleanup: Logo, Breadcrumb, and Search Removal
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see the DataTools Pro logo in the header instead of breadcrumb text, so that the app branding is consistent with datatoolspro.com.
description:
Clean up the application header by removing breadcrumbs and the search bar, and replacing them with the DataTools Pro logo.

## Changes
- Hide breadcrumbs
- Remove search functionality from header
- Replace breadcrumb text with the white DataTools Pro logo
- Match logo size to datatoolspro.com for visual consistency
- Upload all three logo variations (white, color, dark) to the server for future flexibility
acceptance_criteria: Breadcrumbs are hidden from the header
Search bar is removed from the header
White DataTools Pro logo appears in place of breadcrumb text
All three logo variations are uploaded to the server
ux_changes: Header simplified by removing breadcrumbs and search, replacing with the white DataTools Pro logo for consistent branding.
implementation_notes: Three logo variations (white, color, dark) uploaded to the server. White logo used for the header on the dark background.
comment_summary: Developer completed breadcrumb removal and logo upload. All three logo variations were stored on the server.
